messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a python-pptx script generating a 14-slide creative presentation for Enterprise IT Directors on Cloud Migration Strategy. Use abstract geometric shapes and gradient overlays throughout. Save the output as "Cloud_Migration.pptx". The language of the content must be German using a 16:9 Widescreen slide format. Do not use any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import ChartData


# ── Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY = RGBColor(0x0A, 0x19, 0x2F)
SECONDARY = RGBColor(0x1E, 0x3A, 0x5F)
ACCENT = RGBColor(0x00, 0xB4, 0xD8)
HIGHLIGHT = RGBColor(0xFF, 0x6B, 0x35)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF0, 0xF4, 0xF8)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x1A, 0x1A, 0x2E)
MID_GRAY = RGBColor(0x6C, 0x75, 0x7D)

FONT_TITLE = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"

LEFT_MARGIN = Inches(0.5)
RIGHT_MARGIN = Inches(0.5)
TOP_MARGIN = Inches(0.75)
BOTTOM_MARGIN = Inches(0.75)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.3)


# ── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    """Fill the entire slide with a solid background colour."""
    bg_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, SLIDE_HEIGHT)
    bg_shape.fill.solid()
    bg_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    bg_shape.line.fill.background()


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=WHITE, alignment=None):
    """Create a text box with optional alignment."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment or PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_TITLE
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=LIGHT_GRAY):
    """Rounded card with title and body text."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xDD, 0xDD, 0xDD)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = title
    run.font.size = Pt(16)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.7), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.85))
    tf2 = body_box.text_frame
    tf2.word_wrap = True
    p2 = tf2.paragraphs[0]
    run2 = p2.add_run()
    run2.text = body
    run2.font.size = Pt(13)
    run2.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
    run2.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_position):
    """Small accent bar + label for section headers."""
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, LEFT_MARGIN, y_position, Inches(0.15), Inches(0.4))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    bar.line.fill.background()

    label_box = add_text_box(slide, LEFT_MARGIN + Inches(0.3), y_position - Inches(0.02), Inches(6), Inches(0.5), text, font_size=14, bold=True, color=ACCENT)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    """Footer with presentation name and page number."""
    left_text = "Cloud-Migrationsstrategie"
    right_text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"

    add_text_box(slide, LEFT_MARGIN, SLIDE_HEIGHT - Inches(0.35), Inches(4), Inches(0.25), left_text, font_size=10, color=MID_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - RIGHT_MARGIN - Inches(2), SLIDE_HEIGHT - Inches(0.35), Inches(2), Inches(0.25), right_text, font_size=10, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    """Insert image if file exists; otherwise draw a styled placeholder."""
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        ph = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        ph.fill.solid()
        ph.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xEC, 0xF1)
        ph.line.color.rgb = ACCENT
        ph.line.width = Pt(2)

        label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3))
        tf = label_box.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "Bild-Platzhalter"
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = MID_GRAY


def add_accent_circle(slide, cx, cy, radius):
    """Decorative semi-transparent circle."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, cx - radius, cy - radius, radius * 2, radius * 2)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    shape.line.fill.background()
    # Set transparency via alpha (pptx doesn't expose alpha directly; use fill.transparency if available)
    try:
        shape.fill.fore_color.alpha = 30000  # ~30% opacity
    except Exception:
        pass


def add_gradient_overlay(slide, left, top, width, height, color1, color2):
    """Layer two semi-transparent rectangles to simulate a gradient overlay."""
    r1 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    r1.fill.solid()
    r1.fill.fore_color.rgb = color1
    try:
        r1.fill.fore_color.alpha = 40000
    except Exception:
        pass
    r1.line.fill.background()

    r2 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + width / 2, top, width / 2, height)
    r2.fill.solid()
    r2.fill.fore_color.rgb = color2
    try:
        r2.fill.fore_color.alpha = 40000
    except Exception:
        pass
    r2.line.fill.background()


# ── Slide Builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

def title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, PRIMARY)

    # Gradient overlay
    add_gradient_overlay(slide, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, SLIDE_HEIGHT, ACCENT, SECONDARY)

    # Decorative circles
    add_accent_circle(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.5), Inches(1.8))
    add_accent_circle(slide, Inches(11.5), Inches(5.0), Inches(1.2))

    # Title
    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(10), Inches(1.5))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Cloud-Migrationsstrategie"
    run.font.size = Pt(48)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = WHITE
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    # Subtitle
    sub_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(9), Inches(0.8))
    tf2 = sub_box.text_frame
    p2 = tf2.paragraphs[0]
    run2 = p2.add_run()
    run2.text = "Strategischer Leitfaden für Enterprise-IT-Direktoren"
    run2.font.size = Pt(24)
    run2.font.color.rgb = ACCENT
    run2.font.name = FONT_BODY

    # Accent line under title
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.35), Inches(3), Inches(0.06))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = HIGHLIGHT
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 1, 14)


def agenda_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    # Title area with accent bar
    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.5), Inches(10), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Inhaltsübersicht"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(1.2), Inches(2), Inches(0.08))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    bar.line.fill.background()

    # 6 agenda items in 3x2 grid
    items = [
        ("Cloud-Migration", "Treiber & Motivation"),
        ("Herausforderungen", "Risiken identifizieren"),
        ("Migrationsphasen", "Vom Plan zur Umsetzung"),
        ("Architektur-Modelle", "IaaS, PaaS, SaaS"),
        ("Sicherheit & Kosten", "Governance optimieren"),
        ("Roadmap & KPIs", "Erfolg messen")
    ]

    card_w = Inches(3.8)
    card_h = Inches(1.0)
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(items):
        col = i % 3
        row = i // 3
        left = LEFT_MARGIN + col * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        top = Inches(1.6) + row * (card_h + CARD_GAP)

        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, title, body)

    add_footer(slide, 2, 14)


def drivers_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    # Title
    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.5), Inches(10), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Warum Cloud-Migration?"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(1.2), Inches(2), Inches(0.08))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    bar.line.fill.background()

    # 5 driver cards in a row with circles as icons
    drivers = [
        ("Skalierbarkeit", "Elastische Ressourcen\nnach Bedarf"),
        ("Kostenoptimierung", "Pay-per-Use Modelle\nreduzieren CAPEX"),
        ("Innovation", "Schnellere Time-to-Market\nfür neue Produkte"),
        ("Resilienz", "Höhere Verfügbarkeit\n& Disaster Recovery"),
        ("Globalität", "Weltweite Präsenz\nmit einem Klick")
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.1)
    card_h = Inches(3.5)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 5 * card_w - 4 * CARD_GAP) / 2 + LEFT_MARGIN
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(drivers):
        left = start_x + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        top = Inches(1.6)

        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, title, body)

        # Circle icon above each card
        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left + card_w / 2 - Inches(0.3), top - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
        circle.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 3, 14)


def challenges_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.5), Inches(10), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Herausforderungen"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(1.2), Inches(2), Inches(0.08))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    bar.line.fill.background()

    challenges = [
        ("Komplexität", "Migrationsplanung erfordert detaillierte Analyse aller Abhängigkeiten"),
        ("Sicherheit", "Daten- und Compliance-Anforderungen müssen gewährleistet sein"),
        ("Kostenkontrolle", "Unerwartete Cloud-Kosten können das Budget sprengen"),
        ("Skill-Gap", "Team muss für neue Technologien geschult werden")
    ]

    card_w = Inches(5.8)
    card_h = Inches(1.2)
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(challenges):
        left = LEFT_MARGIN + (i % 2) * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        top = Inches(1.6) + (i // 2) * (card_h + CARD_GAP)

        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, title, body)

    add_footer(slide, 4, 14)


def phases_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.5), Inches(10), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Phasen der Migration"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(1.2), Inches(2), Inches(0.08))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    bar.line.fill.background()

    phases = [
        ("Analyse", "Bestandsaufnahme\n& Priorisierung"),
        ("Planung", "Architektur-Design\n& Roadmap"),
        ("Migration", "Schrittweise Umsetzung\n& Testing"),
        ("Optimierung", "Kosten & Performance\nfeinjustieren"),
        ("Betrieb", "Monitoring &\nContinuous Improvement")
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.0)
    card_h = Inches(3.5)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 5 * card_w - 4 * CARD_GAP) / 2 + LEFT_MARGIN
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(phases):
        left = start_x + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        top = Inches(1.6)

        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, title, body)

        # Phase number badge
        badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left + card_w / 2 - Inches(0.35), top - Inches(0.7), Inches(0.7), Inches(0.7))
        badge.fill.solid()
        badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = HIGHLIGHT
        badge.line.fill.background()

        num_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + card_w / 2 - Inches(0.35), top - Inches(0.65), Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4))
        tf_num = num_box.text_frame
        p_num = tf_num.paragraphs[0]
        run_num = p_num.add_run()
        run_num.text = str(i + 1)
        run_num.font.size = Pt(20)
        run_num.font.bold = True
        run_num.font.color.rgb = WHITE
        run_num.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    # Connecting line across phases
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, start_x + card_w / 2, Inches(3.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * LEFT_MARGIN - card_w, Inches(0.05))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 5, 14)


def architecture_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.5), Inches(10), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Architektur-Modelle"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(1.2), Inches(2), Inches(0.08))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    bar.line.fill.background()

    archs = [
        ("IaaS", "Infrastructure as a Service\nVollständige Kontrolle über Infrastruktur\nBeispiel: AWS EC2, Azure VMs"),
        ("PaaS", "Platform as a Service\nEntwicklungsplattform ohne Infrastruktur-Management\nBeispiel: Google App Engine, Azure Functions"),
        ("SaaS", "Software as a Service\nFertige Anwendungen direkt nutzbar\nBeispiel: Office 365, Salesforce")
    ]

    card_w = Inches(3.8)
    card_h = Inches(4.0)
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(archs):
        left = LEFT_MARGIN + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        top = Inches(1.6)

        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, title, body)

        # Colored accent bar at top of each card
        accent_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, card_w, Inches(0.15))
        colors = [ACCENT, HIGHLIGHT, SECONDARY]
        accent_bar.fill.solid()
        accent_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = colors[i]
        accent_bar.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 6, 14)


def security_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.5), Inches(10), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Sicherheit & Compliance"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(1.2), Inches(2), Inches(0.08))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    bar.line.fill.background()

    # Left column: principles
    left_x = LEFT_MARGIN + Inches(0.3)
    top_y = Inches(1.6)
    principles = [
        "Zero-Trust-Architektur implementieren",
        "Verschlüsselung für Daten in Transit & at Rest",
        "Multi-Faktor-Authentifizierung (MFA)",
        "Regelmäßige Sicherheitsaudits durchführen"
    ]

    for i, principle in enumerate(principles):
        bullet_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left_x, top_y + i * Inches(0.6), Inches(5.5), Inches(0.5))
        tf_b = bullet_box.text_frame
        p_b = tf_b.paragraphs[0]
        run_b = p_b.add_run()
        run_b.text = f"• {principle}"
        run_b.font.size = Pt(16)
        run_b.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run_b.font.name = FONT_BODY

    # Right column: checklist card
    add_card(slide, Inches(7.0), top_y, Inches(5.8), Inches(4.2), "Compliance-Checkliste",
             "✓ DSGVO-konforme Datenhaltung\n✓ ISO 27001 Zertifizierung prüfen\n✓ Branchenspezifische Regularien beachten\n✓ Access-Control-Policies definieren\n✓ Incident-Response-Plan erstellen")

    add_footer(slide, 7, 14)


def cost_analysis_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.5), Inches(10), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Kostenanalyse"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(1.2), Inches(2), Inches(0.08))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    bar.line.fill.background()

    # Donut chart showing cost distribution
    chart_data = ChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Compute", "Storage", "Netzwerk", "Lizenzen", "Support"]
    chart_data.add_series("Kostenverteilung (%)", (35, 20, 15, 18, 12))

    left_pos = Inches(0.8)
    top_pos = Inches(1.6)
    width_pos = Inches(5.5)
    height_pos = Inches(4.5)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, left_pos, top_pos, width_pos, height_pos, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.has_title = False

    # Right side: key insights card
    add_card(slide, Inches(7.0), Inches(1.6), Inches(5.8), Inches(4.2), "Kostenoptimierung",
             "• Reserved Instances für stabile Workloads\n• Spot-Instances für batch processing nutzen\n• Auto-Scaling aktivieren\n• Tagging-Strategie implementieren\n• Regelmäßige Cost-Analysen durchführen")

    add_footer(slide, 8, 14)


def roadmap_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.5), Inches(10), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Implementierungs-Roadmap"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(1.2), Inches(2), Inches(0.08))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    bar.line.fill.background()

    milestones = [
        ("Q1 2025", "Strategie-Definition & Stakeholder-Buy-in"),
        ("Q2 2025", "Proof-of-Concept & Pilot-Migration"),
        ("Q3 2025", "Migration kritischer Workloads"),
        ("Q4 2025", "Vollständige Migration & Optimierung"),
        ("Q1 2026", "Continuous Improvement & Governance")
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.2)
    card_h = Inches(3.8)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 5 * card_w - 4 * CARD_GAP) / 2 + LEFT_MARGIN
    for i, (quarter, desc) in enumerate(milestones):
        left = start_x + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        top = Inches(1.6)

        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, quarter, desc)

        # Milestone diamond shape above card
        diamond = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.DIAMOND, left + card_w / 2 - Inches(0.3), top - Inches(0.85), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6))
        diamond.fill.solid()
        diamond.fill.fore_color.rgb = HIGHLIGHT
        diamond.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 9, 14)


def team_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.5), Inches(10), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Team & Rollen"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(1.2), Inches(2), Inches(0.08))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    bar.line.fill.background()

    roles = [
        ("Cloud Architect", "Design der Zielarchitektur\n& Technologie-Stack"),
        ("DevOps Engineer", "CI/CD-Pipelines & Automatisierung"),
        ("Security Specialist", "Sicherheitskonzept & Compliance"),
        ("Data Migration Lead", "Datenstrategie & Migrationsplanung")
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    card_h = Inches(3.5)
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(roles):
        left = LEFT_MARGIN + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        top = Inches(1.6)

        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, title, body)

        # Role icon circle
        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left + card_w / 2 - Inches(0.35), top - Inches(0.7), Inches(0.7), Inches(0.7))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
        circle.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 10, 14)


def risk_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.5), Inches(10), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Risikomanagement"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(1.2), Inches(2), Inches(0.08))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    bar.line.fill.background()

    risks = [
        ("Datenverlust", "Hoch", "Backup-Strategie & Replikation"),
        ("Downtime", "Mittel", "Blue-Green Deployment"),
        ("Kostenüberschreitung", "Niedrig", "Budget-Kontrollmechanismen"),
        ("Vendor Lock-in", "Mittel", "Multi-Cloud-Ansatz")
    ]

    card_w = Inches(5.8)
    card_h = Inches(1.0)
    for i, (risk, level, mitigation) in enumerate(risks):
        left = LEFT_MARGIN + (i % 2) * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        top = Inches(1.6) + (i // 2) * (card_h + CARD_GAP)

        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, risk, f"Risiko-Level: {level}\nMaßnahme: {mitigation}")

    add_footer(slide, 11, 14)


def kpi_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.5), Inches(10), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Erfolgskennzahlen (KPIs)"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(1.2), Inches(2), Inches(0.08))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    bar.line.fill.background()

    kpis = [
        ("Migrationsrate", "75% der Workloads\nin Cloud migriert"),
        ("Kostenersparnis", "30% Reduktion\nvs. On-Premise"),
        ("Verfügbarkeit", "99.9% Uptime\nSLA erreicht"),
        ("Performance", "< 100ms Latenz\nfür kritische Apps"),
        ("Sicherheit", "Zero-Trust\nimplementiert"),
        ("Team-Kapazität", "+40% Effizienz\ndurch Automatisierung")
    ]

    card_w = Inches(3.8)
    card_h = Inches(1.5)
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(kpis):
        col = i % 3
        row = i // 3
        left = LEFT_MARGIN + col * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        top = Inches(1.6) + row * (card_h + CARD_GAP)

        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, title, body)

    add_footer(slide, 12, 14)


def next_steps_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.5), Inches(10), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Nächste Schritte"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(1.2), Inches(2), Inches(0.08))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    bar.line.fill.background()

    steps = [
        "Cloud-Migrationsstrategie finalisieren & genehmigen lassen",
        "Pilot-Projekt mit nicht-kritischen Workloads starten",
        "Team aufbauen & Schulungsprogramm initiieren",
        "Cloud-Anbieter auswählen & Vertrag verhandeln",
        "Migrations-Tooling evaluieren & implementieren"
    ]

    for i, step in enumerate(steps):
        top = Inches(1.6) + i * Inches(0.85)

        # Number badge
        num_circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, LEFT_MARGIN + Inches(0.3), top - Inches(0.05), Inches(0.5), Inches(0.5))
        num_circle.fill.solid()
        num_circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
        num_circle.line.fill.background()

        num_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(LEFT_MARGIN + Inches(0.3), top, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4))
        tf_num = num_box.text_frame
        p_num = tf_num.paragraphs[0]
        run_num = p_num.add_run()
        run_num.text = str(i + 1)
        run_num.font.size = Pt(18)
        run_num.font.bold = True
        run_num.font.color.rgb = WHITE
        run_num.font.name = FONT_TITLE

        # Step text
        step_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(LEFT_MARGIN + Inches(1.0), top, Inches(9), Inches(0.5))
        tf_step = step_box.text_frame
        p_step = tf_step.paragraphs[0]
        run_step = p_step.add_run()
        run_step.text = step
        run_step.font.size = Pt(18)
        run_step.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run_step.font.name = FONT_BODY

    add_footer(slide, 13, 14)


def closing_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PRIMARY)

    # Gradient overlay
    add_gradient_overlay(slide, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, SLIDE_HEIGHT, ACCENT, SECONDARY)

    # Decorative circles
    add_accent_circle(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(3.5), Inches(1.5))
    add_accent_circle(slide, Inches(11.0), Inches(4.0), Inches(1.0))

    # Thank you text
    thank_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(2.5), Inches(10), Inches(1.2))
    tf = thank_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Vielen Dank!"
    run.font.size = Pt(48)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = WHITE
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    # Subtitle
    sub_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(9), Inches(0.6))
    tf2 = sub_box.text_frame
    p2 = tf2.paragraphs[0]
    run2 = p2.add_run()
    run2.text = "Ihr Weg in die Cloud beginnt jetzt"
    run2.font.size = Pt(24)
    run2.font.color.rgb = ACCENT
    run2.font.name = FONT_BODY

    # Accent line
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.5), Inches(3), Inches(0.06))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = HIGHLIGHT
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    # Contact placeholder
    contact_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(9), Inches(0.6))
    tf3 = contact_box.text_frame
    p3 = tf3.paragraphs[0]
    run3 = p3.add_run()
    run3.text = "Kontakt: cloud-migration@unternehmen.de | +49 30 12345678"
    run3.font.size = Pt(14)
    run3.font.color.rgb = MID_GRAY
    run3.font.name = FONT_BODY

    add_footer(slide, 14, 14)


# ── Main ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    # Set widescreen dimensions (16:9)
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    builders = [
        title_slide,
        agenda_slide,
        drivers_slide,
        challenges_slide,
        phases_slide,
        architecture_slide,
        security_slide,
        cost_analysis_slide,
        roadmap_slide,
        team_slide,
        risk_slide,
        kpi_slide,
        next_steps_slide,
        closing_slide,
    ]

    for builder in builders:
        builder(prs)

    prs.save("Cloud_Migration.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
